candidates.label: Concise microstatus updates
candidates.description: Short declarative statements or single-word exclamations that serve as standalone status messages.
candidates.scope_note: Observed in a few sporadic posts within this batch.
candidates.boundary_note: Not all short posts are purely declarative; some include commentary (e.g., FB-001968).

candidates.label: Playful festive greetings
candidates.description: Posts that begin with a holiday or celebration greeting, often with informal wording.
candidates.scope_note: Appears on a handful of holiday posts in this batch.
candidates.boundary_note: Other festive mentions may not follow the same informal style (e.g., FB-002994).

candidates.label: Travel narrative updates
candidates.description: First-person posts that list multiple locations and describe journeys between them.

citations.text: From Texas to Colorado to Texas Roadhouse to drink a local Brew from Colorado
We woke up in Shreveport LA this morning with no particular plans. Went 350 miles by car, foot, and pedicab. Waking up in Austin tomorrow with no particular plans.

candidates.scope_note: Found in two non-adjacent posts of this batch.
candidates.boundary_note: Not all posts that mention locations are travel narratives; for example FB-001953.
